testcase.name: test_discover_get
testcase.failure:
self = <test_base.TestBase testMethod=test_discover_get> mock_head = <MagicMock name='head' id='4573430512'> mock_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4573431520'>
@patch('requests.get') @patch('requests.head') def test_discover_get(self, mock_head, mock_get): inbox = "http://example.org/inbox" links = {"type": {"url": "http://www.w3.org/ns/ldp#Container"}} headers = {"content-type": "application/n-triples"}
mock_res1 = Mock() mock_res1.links = links mock_res1.headers = headers mock_head.return_value = mock_res1
mock_res2 = Mock() mock_res2.links = links mock_res2.headers = headers mock_res2.text = "<http://example.org/resource> " + \ "<http://www.w3.org/ns/ldp#inbox> " + \ "<http://example.org/inbox> .\n" mock_get.return_value = mock_res2
ldn = BaseLDN() > self.assertEqual(ldn.discover("http://example.org/resource"), inbox) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_base.py:41: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ldnlib/base.py:83: in discover inbox = self.__discover_head(target, headers=headers, _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ldnlib.base.BaseLDN object at 0x1108be710> target = 'http://example.org/resource' kwargs = {'allow_redirects': True, 'headers': {'accept': 'application/ld+json; q=1.0,text/turtle; q=0.9,application/xml+rdf; q=0.5'}} buffer = <_io.BytesIO object at 0x11098ac00> c = <pycurl.Curl object at 0x1048bf580> headers = {'accept': 'application/ld+json; q=1.0,text/turtle; q=0.9,application/xml+rdf; q=0.5'} headers_list = ['Accept: application/ld+json; q=1.0,text/turtle; q=0.9,application/xml+rdf; q=0.5'] response_code = 403
def __discover_head(self, target, **kwargs): buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, target) c.setopt(c.NOBODY, True) headers = kwargs.get('headers', {}) if 'accept' in headers: headers_list = [f'Accept: {headers["accept"]}'] else: headers_list = [f'Accept: {self.accept_headers}'] c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, headers_list) c.setopt(c.WRITEFUNCTION, buffer.write) c.perform() response_code = c.getinfo(c.RESPONSE_CODE) c.close()
if response_code != 200: > raise Exception(f"HTTP error: {response_code}") E Exception: HTTP error: 403
ldnlib/base.py:35: Exception

testcase.name: test_discover_head
testcase.failure:
self = <test_base.TestBase testMethod=test_discover_head> mock_head = <MagicMock name='head' id='4573433200'>
@patch('requests.head') def test_discover_head(self, mock_head): inbox = "http://example.org/inbox" mock_res = Mock() mock_res.links = {"http://www.w3.org/ns/ldp#inbox": {"url": inbox}}
mock_head.return_value = mock_res
ldn = BaseLDN() > self.assertEqual(ldn.discover("http://example.org/resource"), inbox) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_base.py:18: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ldnlib/base.py:83: in discover inbox = self.__discover_head(target, headers=headers, _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ldnlib.base.BaseLDN object at 0x1108bf110> target = 'http://example.org/resource' kwargs = {'allow_redirects': True, 'headers': {'accept': 'application/ld+json; q=1.0,text/turtle; q=0.9,application/xml+rdf; q=0.5'}} buffer = <_io.BytesIO object at 0x11098b600> c = <pycurl.Curl object at 0x1048c52a0> headers = {'accept': 'application/ld+json; q=1.0,text/turtle; q=0.9,application/xml+rdf; q=0.5'} headers_list = ['Accept: application/ld+json; q=1.0,text/turtle; q=0.9,application/xml+rdf; q=0.5'] response_code = 403
def __discover_head(self, target, **kwargs): buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, target) c.setopt(c.NOBODY, True) headers = kwargs.get('headers', {}) if 'accept' in headers: headers_list = [f'Accept: {headers["accept"]}'] else: headers_list = [f'Accept: {self.accept_headers}'] c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, headers_list) c.setopt(c.WRITEFUNCTION, buffer.write) c.perform() response_code = c.getinfo(c.RESPONSE_CODE) c.close()
if response_code != 200: > raise Exception(f"HTTP error: {response_code}") E Exception: HTTP error: 403
ldnlib/base.py:35: Exception

testcase.name: test_notification_jsonld
testcase.failure:
self = <test_consumer.TestConsumer testMethod=test_notification_jsonld> mock_get = <MagicMock name='get' id='4423404912'>
@patch('requests.get') def test_notification_jsonld(self, mock_get): mock_res = Mock() mock_res.headers = {"content-type": "application/ld+json"} with open("tests/notification1.json", "r") as f: attrs = {'json.return_value': json.loads("[" + f.read() + "]")} mock_res.configure_mock(**attrs)
mock_get.return_value = mock_res
> notification = Consumer().notification("http://example.org/inbox/1") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
tests/test_consumer.py:111: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ldnlib.consumer.Consumer object at 0x1109917f0> iri = 'http://example.org/inbox/1', kwargs = {} headers = {'accept': 'application/ld+json; q=1.0,text/turtle; q=0.9,application/xml+rdf; q=0.5'} buffer = <_io.BytesIO object at 0x1109d8860> c = <pycurl.Curl object at 0x121653950>, response_code = 403
def notification(self, iri, **kwargs): """ Retrieve a single LDN notification and decode into a Python object. """ headers = kwargs.pop("headers", dict()) if 'accept' not in headers: headers['accept'] = kwargs.pop("accept", self.accept_headers)
buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, iri) c.setopt(c.WRITEDATA, buffer) c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, [f"{key}: {value}" for key, value in headers.items()])
try: c.perform() response_code = c.getinfo(c.RESPONSE_CODE) if response_code != 200: > raise Exception(f"HTTP error: {response_code}") E Exception: HTTP error: 403
ldnlib/consumer.py:59: Exception

testcase.failure:

mock_get.return_value = mock_res
> notification = Consumer().notification("http://example.org/inbox/1") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^

buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, iri) c.setopt(c.WRITEDATA, buffer) c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, [f"{key}: {value}" for key, value in headers.items()])

def notifications(self, inbox, **kwargs): """ Retrieve all of the notification IRIs from an ldp:inbox as a list. """ headers = kwargs.pop("headers", dict()) if 'accept' not in headers: headers['accept'] = kwargs.pop("accept", self.accept_headers)
buffer = BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, inbox) c.setopt(c.WRITEDATA, buffer) c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, [f"{key}: {value}" for key, value in headers.items()])
try: c.perform() response_code = c.getinfo(c.RESPONSE_CODE) if response_code != 200: > raise Exception(f"HTTP error: {response_code}") E Exception: HTTP error: 403

testcase.name: test_send_dict

failure.message: ValueError: Request failed with status code 405

testcase.failure:
self = <test_sender.TestSender testMethod=test_send_dict> mock_post = <MagicMock name='post' id='4573438912'>
@patch('requests.post') def test_send_dict(self, mock_post): data = None with open("tests/notification.json", "r") as f: data = json.loads(f.read())
> Sender().send(self.INBOX, data)
tests/test_sender.py:31: _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ ldnlib/sender.py:67: in send self.__post_message(inbox, json.dumps(data), self.JSON_LD, _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _ _
self = <ldnlib.sender.Sender object at 0x110992510> inbox = 'http://example.org/inbox' data = '{"@context": {"schema": "http://schema.org/", "creator": {"@id": "schema:creator", "@type": "@id"}}, "creator": "http://example.org/user"}' content_type = 'application/ld+json', kwargs = {} buffer = <_io.BytesIO object at 0x110a4c9f0> c = <pycurl.Curl object at 0x105c09c30> headers = {'content-type': 'application/ld+json'}, response_code = 405
def __post_message(self, inbox, data, content_type, **kwargs): if self.allow_localhost or not self.__is_localhost(inbox): buffer = io.BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, inbox) c.setopt(c.POSTFIELDS, data) headers = kwargs.pop("headers", dict()) headers['content-type'] = content_type c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, [f"{key}: {value}" for key, value in headers.items()])
c.perform() response_code = c.getinfo(c.RESPONSE_CODE) if response_code != 200: > raise ValueError(f"Request failed with status code {response_code}") E ValueError: Request failed with status code 405
ldnlib/sender.py:59: ValueError

def __post_message(self, inbox, data, content_type, **kwargs): if self.allow_localhost or not self.__is_localhost(inbox): buffer = io.BytesIO() c = pycurl.Curl() c.setopt(c.URL, inbox) c.setopt(c.POSTFIELDS, data) headers = kwargs.pop("headers", dict()) headers['content-type'] = content_type c.setopt(c.HTTPHEADER, [f"{key}: {value}" for key, value in headers.items()])
c.perform() response_code = c.getinfo(c.RESPONSE_CODE) if response_code != 200: > raise ValueError(f"Request failed with status code {response_code}") E ValueError: Request failed with status code 405
